title: Charter to Hold Webcast to Discuss Third Quarter 2022 Financial and Operating Results

title: Charter's (CHTR) Spectrum Launches on Comcast XClass TV
text: Charter Communications' (CHTR) Spectrum launches Spectrum TV app on XClass TV to drive customer base.

title: Charter's Tom Rutledge, A 50-Year Cable TV Veteran, To Pass CEO Baton To COO Chris Winfrey In December
text: Charter Communications, a major broadband provider and the No. 2 U.S. cable TV operator, has promoted Chris Winfrey to CEO. On December 1, he will succeed longtime cable business leader Tom Rutledge, who will segue to an executive chairman role after five decades in the industry.

title: Tom Rutledge, who turned Charter into a cable powerhouse, to step down as CEO
text: Charter CEO Tom Rutledge will step down on Dec. 1 after a decade leading the company. He will remain executive chairman until November 2023.

title: CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS NAMES CHRIS WINFREY PRESIDENT AND CEO EFFECTIVE DECEMBER 1
text: Tom Rutledge to Serve as Executive Chairman of the Company and its Board of Directors through 2023 STAMFORD, Conn. , Sept. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) ("Charter" or "Charter Communications") today announced that Chris Winfrey has been named President and Chief Executive Officer of Charter Communications, effective December 1, 2022.

title: Charter stock sinks toward 3 1/2-year low, after judge cuts payment to murder victim's family to $1.15 billion
text: Shares of Charter Communications Inc. CHTR, -2.38% dropped 2.1% in afternoon trading Tuesday toward a 3 1/2-year low, buy pared earlier losses of as much as 2.7%, after a Texas judge reduced what the cable company must pay in damages to a murder victim's family to $1.15 billion, according to a report in The Wall Street Journal. Previously, a Texas jury had found the company liable for $7 billion in punitive damages, after finding the company liable for one of its employees who robbed and killed a customer in 2019, the WSJ reported.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch From the Prospering Cable Television Industry
text: The Zacks Cable Television industry participants like Comcast (CMCSA), Charter Communications (CHTR) and Rogers Communication (RCI) are benefiting from growing demand for high-speed Internet and increased consumption of media amid significant cord-cutting.

title: Charter to Participate in Goldman Sachs Investor Conference
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Sept. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) (along with its subsidiaries, "Charter") today announced that Tom Rutledge, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, will participate in the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference in San Francisco on Wednesday, September 14, 2022.
